name: noc-pkcs7-certbundle
description: Local PKCS#7 certificate-bundle evidence without signature or private-key operations.

interface.shortDescription: Local PKCS#7/P7B certificate-bundle evidence without signing.
interface.longDescription: Installable local Codex plugin for inspecting PKCS#7/P7B/P7C certificate bundles as metadata-only evidence. It verifies local parser availability and records safe bundle metadata without loading private keys, importing PFX/PKCS#12 files, creating signatures, verifying signatures, requesting PINs or sending certificate material to external services.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a local PKCS#7 certificate bundle without signing.
Create metadata-only evidence for a P7B certificate chain.
Check whether local PKCS#7 tooling is available.
